_comment: Feeds fetched by scripts/ingest-local.mjs on the reader's own machine, NOT by the cloud run. Substack IP-bans GitHub Actions runners outright (every UA, measured 2026-07-17), so these can only be reached from a residential IP. ingest.mjs counts them as live sources for the pool prune; keep each URL out of sources.json or it will fail every cloud ingest and page the health check.
